passive.name: Electric Amplification
passive.description: Grants 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% Attribute DMG Bonus. When dealing Resonance Skill DMG, increases ATK by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%, stacking up to 2/2/2/2/2 times. This effect lasts for 5/5/5/5/5s. When the wielder is not on the field, increases their ATK by an additional 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.
